title: Non-domestic rating: business floorspace quality assurance of administrative data and public consultation
body: "This release includes details of the quality of the property attribute data that feeds into our business floorspace statistics.  It also includes a public consultation document, presenting two options for the way we measure business floorspace in future statistical releases. The consultation closed on 30 January 2025 and a summary of the responses is included in this release.  We hope that the documents are informative and useful to you.  If you would like any further information on this release or any other statistical release please contact:  The VOA statistics team  Email statistics@voa.gov.uk "
